status: P0 EVIDENCE CLOSURE WAVE 1 / CRITICAL PRODUCT IDENTITY BLOCK ACTIVE / NOT PLATINUM CERTIFIED
classification: Unbranded neurotoxin biologic supplier product family
product_context: Authorised botulinum toxin medicines are brand-, serotype-, manufacturing- and potency-assay-specific. Units cannot be assumed interchangeable across products.
evidence_maturity: Extensive authorised-product evidence exists for defined botulinum toxin products and indications. It cannot be transferred to an unbranded catalogue vial.
regulatory_headline: SEROTYPE, BRAND AND POTENCY SYSTEM UNRESOLVED / UNBRANDED PRODUCT NOT AUTHORISED-PRODUCT EQUIVALENT
closure_class: CRITICAL NEUROTOXIN IDENTITY, POTENCY AND AUTHENTICITY
closure_state: BLOCKED — SEROTYPE, PROPER NAME, BRAND, ASSAY AND MANUFACTURER UNKNOWN
authoritative_product_boundary: Authorised botulinum toxin products are prescription medicines with exact proper names, manufacturers, potency assays, indications and non-interchangeable units. XT100 cannot inherit any authorised product label.
critical_closure_controls: Botulinum toxin units are not interchangeable
No assumption that XT100 is onabotulinumtoxinA
No cosmetic or therapeutic injection protocol
Iatrogenic botulism and distant-spread warning retained
Unlicensed, counterfeit and unauthorised supply-chain risks retained
